title: Create: Dreams & Desires
description: A mod that adds random stuff & that may try to fit within creates theme!
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JmybsfWs/images/6e64e31a8abb63137d86859b3a5fc417a18e6889.png)

## Overview  
### Create: Dreams & Desires is an addon for the Create mod that add random QoL, items, & blocks features that relates to old Create & New Create versions!

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JmybsfWs/images/174d0d55937391091adcf7bf9f4d835f146398f4.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JmybsfWs/images/174d0d55937391091adcf7bf9f4d835f146398f4.png)

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JmybsfWs/images/92a7ca6939ac4acddfca6093ce303514849b40df.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JmybsfWs/images/92a7ca6939ac4acddfca6093ce303514849b40df.png)
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JmybsfWs/images/c7318d4aea92b250b5a4a3c60a7194b0749875eb.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JmybsfWs/images/c7318d4aea92b250b5a4a3c60a7194b0749875eb.png)
